## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New skill / rule / hook
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change

## Layer affected

- [ ] Core (`.cognitive-os/`)
- [ ] Plugin
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes work for any project (not tied to a specific stack)
- [ ] I have run `bash tests/run-all-tests.sh` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My commit messages follow conventional commit format
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, project names, or secrets
